title: dovyalis caffra
intro: Dovyalis caffra, also known as the kei apple or Natal plum, is a deciduous shrub native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dovyalis caffra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
